calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Nov-18-2016 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Gary Lieberman in Propria Persona.

The Court stated that this is a petition for final distribution, that there are issues in regards to the attorney fees and asked counsel if he had anything to add. Mr. Lieberman stated that he had nothing to add. The Court stated that there are various UPS items and asked if the $75.00 handling fee is a UPS charge. Mr. Lieberman stated yes but that he is not really sure and that he has all of the packing invoices. The Court stated that he should have identified his relationship with Ms. Kuehn, that by rule when evaluating extraordinary fees the Court needs to consider the ordinary fees but without time-slips it cannot do this, asked that in regards to the accountancy fees for the reserve does it include an expectation of payment for preparing the accounting. Mr. Lieberman replied that it is for the preparation of tax returns. The Court stated that it will review and reduce the fees and took the accounting petition under submission.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Rosado. (Not Reported)

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
